module_description: Monitors RAM and swap usage on the bound host (locally or over SSH). Alerts when usage exceeds the configured percentage thresholds.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable this RAM and SWAP check.
hints.threads: Number of hosts to check in parallel.
hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.alert_ram: RAM usage threshold (%). An alert is triggered when used RAM exceeds this value.
hints.alert_swap: SWAP usage threshold (%). An alert is triggered when used SWAP exceeds this value.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new check name or identifier:
